solution.title: Land Clearance.
solution.description: Most due diligence reads what documents say. HataD checks whether they agree.
solution.step1Body: Every document is checked against every other — not just read in isolation.
solution.step2Body: Most checks read each document separately. We check what happens when they contradict each other — across all six government sources simultaneously.
solution.step3Body: One structured report covering ownership, liabilities, government records, and zoning.
testimonials.title: What Our Clients Didn't Walk Into.
testimonials.subtitle: Real findings from real clearance reports. Details anonymised to protect client confidentiality.
testimonials.case1Headline: The agent said it was clear. It wasn't.
testimonials.case1Body: An active civil dispute filed in 2021 had no trace in the EC or registration documents. Found only through court record cross-reference.
testimonials.case2Headline: The documents looked clean. The liability wasn't.
testimonials.case2Body: A mortgage taken against the property in 2019 appeared nowhere in the documents the seller provided. Surfaced through cross-referencing multiple government records.
testimonials.case3Headline: Three people claimed ownership. Only one was right.
testimonials.case3Body: Conflicting entries across Patta, A-Register, and Sale Deed — each showing a different owner. Full chain mapped. Title fracture point identified.
testimonials.anonymised: All case details anonymised. Findings sourced from actual HataD clearance reports.
testimonials.ctaTitle: Undisclosed mortgage. Active litigation. Fractured title.
testimonials.ctaDescription: One survey number. Every record. Under 3 hours.
faq.a1: We retrieve and cross-reference the Encumbrance Certificate (EC), Patta, Field Measurement Book (FMB), Sale Deed chain, A-Register, mutation records, and court/litigation records — across 6 government databases.
faq.a2: Under 3 hours from the time you submit. You'll receive a confirmation email immediately, and a notification when your report is ready to download.
faq.a3: Yes. Your data is stored on encrypted cloud infrastructure with row-level access controls — only you can access your requests and reports. Download links expire after 7 days, and uploaded documents are permanently deleted after your report is delivered.
faq.q4: What if I need a refund?
faq.a4: Once submitted, refunds are not available as document retrieval begins immediately. If we cannot retrieve sufficient records, a full refund is issued automatically. If we process the wrong property due to our error, we reprocess at no charge within 24 hours.
faq.q5: Do I need to upload any documents?
faq.a5: No. Just enter your survey number and district — we retrieve everything. If you already have documents and want a lower-cost analysis, you can use our upload option at ₹1,599.
cta.title: The Land Is Waiting.
cta.subtitle: Don't let unclear records define a decision worth crores.
